pitchDeck.menuDescription: Discover GED+ in commercial demo mode

hero.title: From a passive Data Room to an active LP-relationship driver.
hero.subtitle: InvestHub centralizes, structures, secures and distributes every document tied to investor relations — and measures real engagement to turn the Data Room into a commercial lever.
hero.quote: Stop wondering whether your investors read your reports. Know it.

vision.title: A Data Room built for alternative investments.
vision.body: InvestHub's GED+ is a core platform component: investor communication, regulatory distribution, lifecycle tracking, compliance, LP & partner portal access. Everything is auditable, everything is measurable.
vision.callout: Where a classic DMS only stores documents, GED+ measures, analyses and optimizes the documentary engagement of investors and their contacts.

bullets.0: Spaces → Folders → Documents architecture designed for scale (tens of thousands of documents per fund).
bullets.1: Targeting by fund, segment, structure, subscription and contact group — with inherited funnel logic.
bullets.2: Multi-language, multi-role: LPs, contacts, advisors, distribution partners.
bullets.3: Full audit trail supporting compliance and commercial follow-up.

flow.title: Six orchestrated stages, in one tool.
flow.subtitle: From document sources to engagement piloting, every stage feeds the next without friction.

sources.title: Document sources
sources.body: InvestHub documents or external systems plugged in via connectors.

organize.title: Spaces & Mass upload
organize.body: Spaces, folders, inherited targeting and bulk upload in a single operation.

validation.title: Validation workflow
validation.body: Validation teams, controlled publishing, full traceability.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.body: Multilingual templates, immediate or scheduled sending, targeted reminders.

portals.title: Investor portals
portals.body: Secure delivery to LPs, contacts and advisors based on their rights.

birdview.title: Birdview
birdview.body: Tracking, engagement measurement, scoring and smart follow-up.

pillars.title: Six pillars to turn the DMS into a piloting tool.

0.title: Business-context architecture
0.body: Dedicated spaces for LP investors, fund reportings, due diligence, partners, multi-fund HNWI — each with its own typology, funds and segments.

1.title: Precise & consistent targeting
1.body: Funds, segments, investors, structures, subscriptions, contact groups. Context is inherited and can never be widened: security by design.

2.title: Native validation workflow
2.body: Activate the workflow per space: assigned validation teams, controlled publishing, notifications sent only after validation.

3.title: Industrial-grade mass import
3.body: Up to 100 documents per session, bulk configuration (folder, targeting, notification, team), automatic session save.

4.title: Tracking & engagement measurement
4.body: Notifications sent and opened, documents viewed and downloaded. Global indicator and rates by investor, contact and advisor.

5.title: Smart follow-up
5.body: Re-engage precisely those who did not open the email or view the document. Customizable templates, CSV export of recipients.

kpis.title: Measured impact for Investor Relations teams.
kpis.subtitle: GED+ becomes an internal IR reporting tool, a commercial prioritization aid, a compliance monitoring tool and a behavioral LP-analysis solution.
kpis.engagement: Document engagement rate visible by space, document and investor.
kpis.massUpload: Time saved on recurring operations: capital calls, reportings, regulatory documents.
kpis.audit: Audit trail on communications: send, delivery, open, click, view, download.
kpis.availability: Documents continuously available on LP, contact and advisor portals.

compare.title: Classic DMS vs InvestHub GED+.
compare.gedPlusTitle: Store, distribute, measure, drive the LP relationship.

gedPlus.3: Behavioral tracking of investors and contacts.
gedPlus.4: Engagement scoring and consultation rate per document.
gedPlus.5: Smart follow-up and LP piloting, including complex institutional LPs.

steps.0: Mass-import the reportings into the targeted space (fund, segment).
steps.1: Validation by the assigned team then automatic publishing.
steps.2: Multilingual notifications sent to the eligible LPs.
steps.3: Document-by-document consultation tracking via Birdview, targeted reminders to non-readers.

steps.0: Dedicated due diligence space with investor targeting.
steps.1: Documents shared with the investor, their contacts and their advisor.
steps.2: Identify the active investor and the driving advisor through Birdview.
steps.3: Selective follow-up of inactive parties to gauge real interest.

cta.title: Ready to turn your Data Room into an engagement engine?
cta.subtitle: Start by exploring an existing space or jump straight into Birdview to visualize your investors' engagement.

orchestration.title: A unified document chain, from source to piloting.
orchestration.subtitle: All your document sources converge into GED+, get validated, are distributed on a centralized and secure portal, then continuously measured via Birdview.

sources.label: Step 1 — Sources
sources.title: Document sources
sources.subtitle: Native InvestHub documents or external systems plugged in via connectors.

engine.label: Step 2 — GED+ Engine
engine.title: Centralize, structure, secure
engine.subtitle: Spaces → Folders → Documents architecture with inherited targeting, performant at scale.
engine.context: Spaces & folders — targeting by fund, segment, structure, subscription and contact group.

import.title: Mass upload
import.body: Up to 100 docs per session, bulk configuration, automatic save.

validation.title: Validation workflow
validation.body: Assigned teams, controlled publishing, full traceability.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.body: Multilingual templates, sent immediately or after validation, never before.

portals.label: Step 3 — Distribution
portals.title: Centralized & secure portal
portals.subtitle: A single entry point for all your audiences, with granular rights and full audit.

birdview.label: Step 4 — Birdview
birdview.title: Tracking & engagement
birdview.subtitle: Every interaction is recorded as a factual event, usable for IR piloting and behavioral LP analysis.

2.title: Engagement rate
2.body: Global, per doc and per LP

validation.title: Document validation
validation.subtitle: Review, approval and rejection of documents before publishing

tooltip.differentTargeting: Different targeting per document — see each row.

drawer.silentBody: This batch groups documents for internal validation only. No email or portal publication will be triggered.

email.subject: Subject
email.footerNote: This e-mail is sent to you by InvestHub as part of your subscription. For any question, contact your Investor Relations representative.

comment.capitalCall: EUR 12.5M aggregate drawdown — {{count}} LP notices to validate before dispatch.
comment.quarterlyReport: Q1 reporting ready for dispatch — to validate before LP Portal publication.

comment.roadshowApproved: Approved with minor edits on slides 12 to 14.
comment.pitchRejected: Rejected: promotional language not compliant with AMF guidelines — to be reworded.

capitalCall.subject: Capital Call notice #{{num}} — {{fund}} (due 22 May 2026)
capitalCall.p1: In connection with your commitment to **{{fund}}**, please find attached drawdown notice #{{num}} for an aggregate amount of **EUR 12,500,000** (your pro-rata share is detailed in the LP allocation schedule).
capitalCall.p2: Funds must be wired to the depositary account before **22 May 2026, 12:00 CET**.
capitalCall.p3: For any question please contact your dedicated Investor Relations representative.

quarterlyReport.subject: Q1 2026 Reporting Pack — {{fund}}
quarterlyReport.p1: Please find enclosed the **Q1 2026 Reporting Pack** for {{fund}}: quarterly report, NAV statement at 31/03/2026 and detailed portfolio KPIs.
quarterlyReport.p2: New investments closed during the quarter and exit pipeline updates are summarised in the manager letter.

taxCertificate.subject: Tax Certificate 2025 — {{investor}} ({{fund}})
taxCertificate.p1: Please find enclosed your **2025 tax certificate** for {{fund}}.

sfdrDisclosure.subject: {{fund}} — SFDR Article 9 Disclosure 2025
sfdrDisclosure.p1: Our SFDR Article 9 disclosure for {{fund}} is now available on the LP Portal alongside the 2025 ESG report.
